title: Dashboard glob reads ‚Äî rewrite server to read new context tree directly
description: After the context tree migration, the dashboard server still reads from deleted/renamed paths (state/, inbox/, done/, intelligence/, lessons.md, backlog.md, features/active/done/). Rewrite ALL server, script, MCP, and frontend code to glob source files directly from the new structure. Kill the indexer (index-state.ts) ‚Äî dashboard reads goal.json, project.json, directive.json, backlog.json directly.

tasks.title: Rewrite work-item-types.ts ‚Äî update TypeScript types for new entity shapes
Rewrite state-watcher.ts ‚Äî glob goal.json/project.json/directive.json/backlog.json directly instead of reading state/*.json
Update context-watcher.ts ‚Äî remove state/ dir ignore, adjust trigger patterns for new file layout
Update goal-watcher.ts ‚Äî watch goal.json files instead of inventory.json
Rewrite server/index.ts ‚Äî update API endpoints (features‚Üíprojects), fix findInboxWork‚ÜífindDirectives, fix findBacklogWork to read backlog.json, remove hardcoded lessons.md path
Rewrite scripts/index-state.ts ‚Äî either delete entirely or rewrite as cache layer over glob reads
Update scripts/foreman.ts ‚Äî read directives/ instead of inbox/, read backlog.json instead of backlog.md, fix lessons path
Update scripts/intelligence-trends.ts ‚Äî intel/ path, remove proposals.log dependency
Rewrite mcp-server/tools/ ‚Äî update paths.ts, status.ts (glob source), backlog.ts (read/write JSON), directive.ts (read directives/ not inbox/)
Update CLI scaffolding ‚Äî init.ts creates directives/ not inbox/+done/, templates reference goal.json+backlog.json+projects/
Update frontend ‚Äî rename features‚Üíprojects in API fetchers, update type fields (hasGoalMd‚ÜíhasGoalJson), update ProjectsPage empty state message
Verify ‚Äî type-check passes, dashboard loads, all pages render with real data
